subject: [DMAAP] Strimzi PoC
commit_message:
[DMAAP] Strimzi PoC

Adding strimzi kafka chart
Adding strimzi-kafka-bridge chart under dmaap components
Removing MR kafka and zookeeper
Configure MR to use the strimzi cluster

Adding support for CPS to use strimzi kafka

Signed-off-by: efiacor <fiachra.corcoran@est.tech>
Change-Id: I99629270b37d1a2fdf869acf539593a07510fd23
Issue-ID: DMAAP-1622
